title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils For Cough
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra essential oils contains compounds like glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. These properties help to calm the throat and reduce irritation that can cause coughing. The anti-inflammatory effect also reduces swelling in the throat, making it easier to breathe and swallow.
